projects.title: CAM
projects.description: A PCB that controls two Runcam Split 4s, uses B2B I2C, implements a video decoder, runs hardware video compression, and transfers live video at 1Mb/s using FSK.

projects.title: EAGLE
projects.description: Receiver board that runs video decompression and processing on received video fragments from CAM FSK payloads. Designed with essentially the same hardware as CAM.

projects.title: GATOR
projects.description: A high voltage power distribution and ground station PCB. It's equipt with a GPS, a LoRa transciever, two stepper motor drivers, and components that come with them.

projects.title: Project EMBER
projects.description: As Technical Lead for EMBER (Embedded Micro-power Bluetooth Energy Research), I spearheaded schematic and layout design for a 17mm-diameter TPMS PCB, and FSM + BLE packet design.

projects.title: Coil Gun
projects.description: I designed, built, and explained with theory a mini coil gun for my AP Physics C final project. (Ignore the project report title as it was added for humorous effect)

projects.title: Genibook
projects.description: An unofficial gradebook app built for my high-school district's gradebook system - Genesis. Underneath this one project is an entire line of smaller projects, evolving from a simple script, that eventually turned into Genibook.

projects.title: GNC Scripts
projects.description: An on-going project. I implemented sensor fusion algorithms for ISS's Spaceshot Rocket's Guidance Navigation and Controls team in C++; I also created post-flight data visualization and processing tools in Python for our SILSIM.

projects.title: FireJams
projects.description: A top-ten hackathon project programmed in Python to recreate Spotify - but with a cozier, friendlier, and most importantly, funnier twist.

projects.title: Calls4Mental
projects.description: A winning hackathon project programmed in Python that is a customizable, AI-powered calling companion that brings approachable virtual therapy to life.

projects.title: SupplyIt!
projects.description: A winning, full-stack hackathon project programmed by myself in Python and Dart to create an app that attempts to solve lost storage supplies.

projects.title: Medicab
projects.description: A winninng, full-stack hackathon project programmed in Python and Dart. Essentially an app with a chatbot and camera support that serves as a database for all your medicines.
